---
title: "References"
output: html_document
bibliography: bib.bib
nocite: '@*'
---




```{r include=FALSE}
knitr::write_bib(c( 
                     #Shiny Libraries 
                    "shiny", "shinyalert", "shinyjs", "shinycssloaders" , "shinymeta", 
                    "shinythemes", "shinyAce" , "shinyBS", "DT", "stats" , 
                     #Data Libraries  
                    "palmerpenguins", "ISLR" ,  
                     #Working Libraries  
                    "tidyverse", "patchwork", "xtable" , "knitr",
                    # task libraries
                    "GGally", "gtools", "Hmisc","magrittr", "car",
                    "margins", "emmeans", "ggeffects", "interactions"), 
                 width = 60) 

# added manually
#  @Manual{R,
#    title = {R: A Language and Environment for Statistical Computing},
#    author = {{R Core Team}},
#    organization = {R Foundation for Statistical Computing},
#    address = {Vienna, Austria},
#    year = {2021},
#    url = {https://www.R-project.org/},
#  }

#  @article{bracht2016evaluation,
#    title={Evaluation of the biomarker candidate MFAP4 for non-invasive assessment of hepatic fibrosis in hepatitis C patients},
#    author={Bracht, Thilo and M{\"o}lleken, Christian and Ahrens, Maike and Poschmann, Gereon and Schlosser, Anders and Eisenacher, Martin and St{\"u}hler, Kai and Meyer, Helmut E and Schmiegel, Wolff H and Holmskov, Uffe and others},
#    journal={Journal of Translational Medicine},
#    volume={14},
#    number={1},
#    pages={1--9},
#    year={2016},
#    publisher={BioMed Central}
#  }
```
